---
id: anonymize-a-customer
title: "Anonymize a customer"
description: "Anonymizes the customer's personal data (email, name). Used for GDPR erasure requests."

  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/Customer/Anonymization"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Anonymizes the customer's personal data (email, name). Used for GDPR erasure requests.
